name: earth-moon-transfer
description: TEMPLATE (needs live Δv tuning): climb to a high orbit, R-detach to deep-space expression, coast a raising trajectory toward the Moon, and check the SOI hands off (body flips earth→moon).
_notes: Hitting a target transfer requires closed-loop Δv reasoning the current dev verbs do NOT precisely provide (there is no fine burn-to-target op) — the DETERMINISTIC SOI-swap + reexpress proof lives in the headless gate verify_spacefly.gd (gate F). This live template exercises the plumbing (high-orbit → detach → coast → long wait) so the orchestrator can watch the streamed body/nav_mode; expect to tune the coast and wait live, and bring in Fable for the maneuver targeting. SOI_SWAP must be enabled in the running build for body to ever read 'moon'.

legs.name: prograde raise + coast toward the Moon
cruise (watch for SOI hand-off to the Moon)
